title: Tickeron AI Delivers 90% Accuracy in Infrastructure Stocks
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
Key Takeaways

* AI trading robots are now posting **\~90% profitable trades** following recent model upgrades.
* Strong results are concentrated in infrastructure-linked names like [**ETN**](https://tickeron.com/ticker/ETN/) **(Eaton),** [**HUBB**](https://tickeron.com/ticker/HUBB/) **(Hubbell), and** [**CAT**](https://tickeron.com/ticker/CAT/) **(Caterpillar)**.
* New **high-speed 5-minute and 15-minute AI agents** are built to adjust quickly to volatility.
* Infrastructure and industrial trends point to **renewed investment and steady demand**.
* The **Presidents’ Day Sale** offers **up to 75% off** Tickeron AI robots, signals, and analytics.

# AI-Powered Outperformance in Infrastructure

Tickeron’s latest performance readout shows infrastructure-focused AI agents delivering standout win rates and returns, beating many comparable sector approaches:

* [**ETN**](https://tickeron.com/ticker/ETN/) **(15-min Agent):** \+73.70% return, 72.02% win rate
* [**HUBB**](https://tickeron.com/ticker/HUBB/) **(5-min Agent):** \+57.00% return, 77.46% win rate
* **PWR Agent:** \+70.14% return, 74.39% win rate
* **CAT (60-min Agent):** \+35.54% return

These outcomes reflect enhanced Financial Learning Models (FLMs) that learn faster, detect deeper patterns, and adapt more smoothly to trend changes. Recent data points to **nearly 90% trade profitability** across active infrastructure strategies, highlighting both improved model performance and strong sector engagement.

# Market Context: Why the Sector Has Momentum

Infrastructure and industrial stocks are drawing increased attention as U.S. construction activity remains firm, supply chain conditions improve, and capital spending plans stay intact. Leaders like **Caterpillar (CAT)** continue to benefit from core machinery demand as well as broader themes such as global infrastructure buildouts and reshoring.

At the same time, price action can still be uneven. For example, **Eaton (ETN)** recently dipped about **1%** even as the broader industrial group advanced—an example of how sentiment can shift quickly within otherwise strong sectors.

# Faster FLMs and High-Speed Execution

[Tickeron](https://tickeron.com/) has expanded its computing infrastructure to speed up FLM training and improve responsiveness to real-time market changes. This upgrade supports the rollout of **new 15-minute and 5-minute AI agents**, built for active traders who want sharper signals in fast intraday environments.

As CEO **Sergey Savastiouk, Ph.D.** notes, these models blend deep learning with advanced technical analysis to improve pattern recognition and deliver more disciplined, risk-managed execution—while remaining accessible even for newer traders.

  
Explore *Trending Robots* that reflect these high‑performance agents here:  
[https://tickeron.com/bot-trading/trending-robots/](https://tickeron.com/bot-trading/trending-robots/)

comments.body: If it really worked you wouldn't be selling it.
